# dandy-ui

Lightweight, edge-first React UI library built on TailwindCSS v4. Optimized for Cloudflare Pages, serverless, and SSR environments.

## Install

npm install dandy-ui

## Setup

import "dandy-ui/theme.css"
import "dandy-ui/base.css"
// Optional: import "dandy-ui/syntax-highlighting.css" for MarkdownViewer

Wrap app with <ThemeProvider> or use <ThemeScript /> in SSR (Next.js / Remix / Astro)

## Entry Points (Code-Split)

Components: import { Button, Dialog } from "dandy-ui" — core components, zero heavy deps
Extra: import { Drawer, DatePicker, MultiSelect } from "dandy-ui/extra" — heavier components with optional peer deps
Markdown: import { MarkdownViewer } from "dandy-ui/markdown" — isolated markdown renderer
Utilities: import { formatDate, debounce } from "dandy-ui/utils" — pure functions, no React
Hooks: import { useTheme, useMediaQuery } from "dandy-ui"

## Edge & Serverless Optimizations

- "sideEffects": false — aggressive tree-shaking, only ships what you import
- 4 code-split entry points — core / extra / markdown / utils, no monolithic bundle
- ES module only (type: "module") — native ESM for modern bundlers
- es2020 target — no unnecessary transpilation for modern runtimes
- Only 2 runtime deps: clsx + tailwind-merge
- ThemeProvider uses useSyncExternalStore — SSR-safe, no hydration mismatch
- ThemeScript injects inline <script> — prevents FOUC without client JS
- Radix overlay/form deps (@radix-ui/react-dialog, react-popover, react-select) are optional via peerDependenciesMeta — install only what you use
- Heavy component deps (vaul, react-day-picker, input-otp, react-markdown) are optional and isolated in dandy-ui/extra or dandy-ui/markdown
- Pure CSS animations via data-attributes — no JS animation runtime

## Core Patterns

Props: variant, size, appearance, leftSlot/rightSlot, rounded, className
Variants: primary, secondary, ghost, success, warning, error, info
Sizes: sm, md, lg
Appearance: filled, outlined

## Components (dandy-ui)

Layout: Flex, Grid, GridItem, Paper, Container, Section, Table, ScrollShadow
Typography: Text, Heading, Hint, Label, Divider, Code, Kbd
Forms: Button, IconButton, Input, TextArea, NumberInput, Select, CheckBox, Radio, Switch, Slider, FileInput, Rating, Icon
Feedback: Alert, Badge, Chips, Spinner, Skeleton, ProgressBar, CircularProgress
Overlays: Dialog, Popover, InfoTip, SnackbarProvider/useSnackbar
Compound: Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent

## Components (dandy-ui/extra)

Drawer, DatePicker, DateRangePicker, MultiDatePicker, MultiSelect, InputOTP, SidebarLayout, SideBar

## Components (dandy-ui/markdown)

MarkdownViewer — requires react-markdown, rehype-highlight, rehype-raw, rehype-sanitize, remark-gfm

## Compound Components

Dialog: Dialog.Trigger, Dialog.Content, Dialog.Header, Dialog.Title, Dialog.Description, Dialog.Footer, Dialog.Close
Drawer: Drawer.Trigger, Drawer.Content, Drawer.Header, Drawer.Title, Drawer.Description, Drawer.Footer, Drawer.Close
Select: SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectGroup, SelectLabel, SelectSeparator
MultiSelect: MultiSelect.Trigger, MultiSelect.Content, MultiSelect.Item, MultiSelect.Label, MultiSelect.Separator, MultiSelect.Group
InputOTP: InputOTPGroup, InputOTPSlot, InputOTPSeparator
Table: Table, TableHead, TableBody, TableRow, TableColumn, TableCell
SidebarLayout: SidebarLayout.Sidebar, SidebarLayout.Content
Accordion: AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent
Popover: Popover.Trigger, Popover.Content

## Utilities (dandy-ui/utils)

cn: Tailwind class merging (clsx + tailwind-merge)
Dates: formatDate, formatTime, formatDateTime, formatRelativeTime, formatDuration, isToday, isYesterday, isThisWeek, startOfDay, endOfDay
Numbers: formatNumber, formatCurrency, formatPercentage, formatCompactNumber, formatDigits, formatList, clampNumber, pluralize
Inputs: formatPhoneNumber, formatCreditCard, maskInput, formatFileSize, sanitize
Validation: isEmail, isPhoneNumber, isURL
Async: debounce, throttle, copyToClipboard

## Hooks

useTheme(): { theme, onThemeChange } — SSR-safe via useSyncExternalStore
useMediaQuery(query): boolean

## Snackbar (Toast System)

Wrap app with <SnackbarProvider position="bottom-right" />
const { showSnackbar } = useSnackbar()
showSnackbar({ message: "Saved", variant: "success" })

## Theme Tokens

Colors: primary, secondary, accent, background, foreground, muted, border, card, popover, success, warning, error, info
Each has -foreground variant (e.g., bg-primary text-primary-foreground)
Radius: --radius-control (inputs), --radius-overlay (dialogs), --radius-surface (cards), --radius-button

## Peer Dependencies

Required: react, react-dom, tailwindcss, @radix-ui/react-tooltip
Optional (dandy-ui core): @radix-ui/react-dialog (Dialog), @radix-ui/react-popover (Popover), @radix-ui/react-select (Select)
Optional (dandy-ui/extra): vaul (Drawer), react-day-picker (DatePicker*), input-otp (InputOTP)
Optional (dandy-ui/markdown): react-markdown, rehype-highlight, rehype-raw, rehype-sanitize, remark-gfm

## Rules

- Use theme tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, border-border)
- Never hardcode colors or use arbitrary Tailwind colors
- Use Flex/Grid for layouts
- Use asChild on trigger components for composition
- Import heavy components from "dandy-ui/extra" not "dandy-ui"
- Import utilities from "dandy-ui/utils"
